rulings.Case Title: MICHELLE HUANG ET AL VS. SANDEEP ANDRE HINGORANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Determine The Disbursement Of Deposits And Release Of Funds
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 04, 2018, Line 1. PLAINTIFFS MICHELLE HUANG, THOMAS PAYNE'S Motion To Determine The Disbursement Of Deposits And Release Of Funds. Defendants' Motion to Determine the Disbursement of Deposits and Release of Funds is DENIED. The determinations sought by the moving party cannot be made on this motion. They have to brought up before the trier of fact or on a dispositive motion on a proper cause of action. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: IGOR GAVRILOV ET AL VS. JAMIE CHANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Re Notice Of Defendants Demurrer To Causes Of Action One Through Seven Of Plaintiffs Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, January 04, 2018, Line 2. DEFENDANTS JAMIE SHANG, HIEN NGUYEN'S Demurrer To Causes Of Action One Through Seven Of Plaintiffs Complaint. Defendant's Demurer to Complaint is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Costa-Hawkins authorizes the public entities to regulate or monitor the basis for eviction (See CC 1954.52(c)). In San Francisco the Rent Ordinance enumerates such bases. Complaint alleges (and allegations must be taken as true) that Defendants exercised their rights under Costa-Hawkins specifically to circumvent the eviction control requirements of the Rent Ordinance. Defendant does not point to any language in the Act, to any authority or to legislative history that would allow such use of the Act. The Court notes that there are no appellate decisions no point. =(501/REQ)
